name: io.github.remoprinz/jasswiki
title: JassWiki — Swiss Jass Authority
description: First publicly attested MCP knowledge server in Switzerland. Provides AI assistants with direct access to the official Swiss Jass encyclopedia (520+ articles on rules, variants, terminology, history, tactics). Authority-attested by Jassverband Schweiz (did:web:jassverband.ch) with cryptographic verification (Ed25519). Curated content recognised by the Swiss Federal Office of Culture as living tradition.
